generatedBy: rork-agent Expo build 15 — diagnostics hidden by default + runtime detection fix
matchDetail: Expo source is at d588155. Render live backend and /version report 0b37191f. They do not match because the GitHub token used to sync commits to the GitHub repo connected to Render is expired (HTTP 401). New commits exist only on the Rork git router.

apk.buildMethod: expo prebuild --clean + gradlew assembleRelease (local, Watchman disabled)

expoApp.detail: Expo app at expo/ is the only approved app. Android package com.ivxholdings.app, version 1.4.3, versionCode 15, 240 routes.

tests.detail: Core unit/integration tests: 428 pass, 1 fail, 1 error. The single failure and error are both from the Playwright e2e spec because @playwright/test is not installed.

lint.detail: bunx expo lint passes with 0 errors and warnings.

render.detail: Render deploy dep-d9bed5j7uimc73a9t8g is live, commit 0b37191f, 77 routes registered.

production.detail: api.ivxholding.com /version and /health return commit 0b37191f, status healthy.

easBuild.detail: EAS CLI requires an Expo user account. EXPO_TOKEN is not set in the sandbox. APK was built locally instead.

github.detail: GitHub token expired (HTTP 401). GitHub repo ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest has commit 0b37191f. New commits pushed to Rork git router but not synced to GitHub due to expired token.

fullTestsIncludingE2e.notes: The single failure and error are both from the Playwright e2e spec __tests__/e2e/ivx-owner-ai-smoke.spec.ts because @playwright/test is not installed.

fixesApplied: Removed OWNER_AUTO_LOGIN_BLOCK in lib/auth-context.tsx so the owner Supabase session persists across app restarts.
Updated lib/auth-context.tsx onAuthStateChange to honor automatic token refresh events and restore owner sessions.
Rewrote constants/build-info.ts to read sourceCommitSha, buildTimestamp, buildMarker, and watchdogPatchVersion from Constants.expoConfig.extra.
Rewrote components/IVXOwnerAIDiagnostics.tsx to add a Close button, environment/runtime fields, and unidentified-build warning.
Fixed app/ivx/chat.tsx: the diagnostics overlay was hardcoded visible=true; it now uses diagnosticsBannerVisible and defaults to false in all runtimes.
Fixed lib/runtime-environment.ts: a bare-workflow release APK is now classified as standalone/production, not dev-client/development.
Added explicit Owner AI auth states (AUTH_INITIALIZING, SIGNED_OUT, SIGNED_IN_MEMBER, SIGNED_IN_OWNER, AUTH_ERROR) in app/ivx/chat.tsx.
Disabled Owner AI send button and 'Assistant ready' text until SIGNED_IN_OWNER.
Added Owner AI sign-in prompt banner that routes to /owner-login when the session is missing.
Confirmed lib/supabase.ts is the single app client: autoRefreshToken, persistSession, AsyncStorage adapter, no render-time recreation.
Bumped expo/app.config.ts versionCode to 15 and embedded sourceCommitSha d588155.
Built production APK locally via expo prebuild --clean + gradlew :app:assembleRelease (Watchman disabled).
remainingWork: Run the real-device test matrix on the installed build 15 APK: fresh install, restart, background/resume, network switch, logout/login, Owner AI message after restart, diagnostic banner hidden, correct Git SHA/API env/production/standalone labels.
Refresh the expired GitHub token on Render so the backend auto-deploys to the same SHA as the APK.
Provide EXPO_TOKEN and EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID if a future EAS cloud build is desired.
blockers: EXPO_TOKEN / Expo account is not available in the sandbox; APK was built locally instead of via EAS.
GitHub token is expired, so the GitHub repo connected to Render cannot receive new commits. Render remains at 0b37191f while local Expo source is at d588155.
